basis: Local seed identifies a legendary GU Elder Dragon with cascade-granting oracle text.
Scryfall card context and EDHREC Commander context exist.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no public decklist copied.
Cascade recommendations must be curve-aware and avoid bad reactive hits.
Use as Commander reference, not cEDH profile.

themes.name: simic_cascade_spells
themes.notes: Instants and sorceries from hand receive cascade, making mana-value curve design central.

themes.name: topdeck_curve_engineering
themes.notes: Topdeck setup and low-MV card quality improve cascade outcomes.

themes.name: ramp_into_value_spells
themes.notes: The deck wants enough ramp to cast expensive spells while still hitting useful lower-MV cascades.

themes.name: spell_copy_value
themes.notes: Copy/value engines scale with high-impact spells but should not replace curve discipline.

high_impact_cascade_spells: Sea Gate Restoration // Sea Gate, Reborn

examples: narrow counterspells as the only low-MV package
reactive spells that miss when cascaded at sorcery speed
avoid_patterns.reason: Cascade can cast cards at awkward times; low-MV hits need broad utility.

examples: ramp deck with no cascade curve planning
avoid_patterns.reason: The commander-specific value is cascade on instants and sorceries.

examples: fast combo shells without source proof
avoid_patterns.reason: Competitive Commander relevance was not proven.
